# Workflow: Marketing Campaign

## Trigger
Campaign launch

## Objective
Drive traffic/conversions

## Inputs
- Offer
- Audience

## Outputs
- Campaign performance

## Steps
1. Define goal
2. Build messaging
3. Create assets
4. Choose channels
5. Schedule content
6. Launch campaign
7. Track metrics
8. Optimize

## KPIs
- CTR
- Conversion Rate
- Traffic

## Deliverables
- Campaign results
